questions.q: Sony recently recorded a $766 million impairment loss against which game development studio following the underperformance of its live-service titles?
On May 11, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump rejected an Iranian response to a U.S. ceasefire proposal that was mediated by which country?
In a May 2026 interview on '60 Minutes,' Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu stated that the war with Iran is 'not over' until what happens?
options: The Strait of Hormuz is fully secured

questions.q: On May 11, 2026, NASA released satellite imagery of a massive, colorful 'dirty' water swirl off the Mid-Atlantic coast, primarily caused by spring blooms of what organisms?
What type of inaudible but 'felt' sound are citizens increasingly complaining about from nearby AI data centers?
A Toronto specialist warned that Canadian hospitalizations for which group of vaccine-preventable illnesses have more than doubled since the pandemic?
options: Hepatitis A, Hepatitis B, and HPV

questions.q: Four Canadians were recently flown to British Columbia for a 21-day quarantine after being evacuated from a cruise ship stricken by an outbreak of which disease?
Following a severe crash near the Surrey-Delta border in B.C., emergency crews were faced with a bizarre scene when a motorcycle was left dangling from what structure?
